summary: PR #2395 primarily decompiled and improved src/melee/lb/lbrefract.c, adding/refining refraction texture-buffer callbacks, initialization/load logic, PObj/DObj class setup, GX/camera texture matrix handling, and typed data layouts. It also adjusted THPDec_80331340's prototype and two lbmthp call sites to pass width. The bot report recorded +1848 matched-code bytes, 9 new matches, several lbrefract partial improvements, and a .sdata regression in lbrefract.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation target; added/refined refraction functions, callback signatures, data structs, GX/HSD setup, typed camera projection access, and data initializers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbrefract.c include/prototype additions and lbRefract_DataLayout/lbl_804336D0_t definitions
raw_diff: lbrefract.c added lbRefract_80021CE8, fn_80021F70, fn_80021FF8, fn_8002206C, lbRefract_800222A4, lbRefract_PObjLoad excerpts
bot_report: main/melee/lb/lbrefract 8 new function matches and multiple improvements

key_files.role: Adjusted two THPDec_80331340 call sites to pass width, completing fn_8001EF5C and improving lbMthp8001FAA0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8001EF5C passes data->width to THPDec_80331340
raw_diff: lbMthp8001FAA0 passes lbl_804335B8.x6C to THPDec_80331340

key_files.role: Updated THPDec_80331340 declaration from four to five parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: void THPDec_80331340(s32, void*, void*, void*, s32)

key_files.role: Header touched by the PR, but exact one-line change is not present in the loaded diff excerpt.

what_changed.text: Recovered concrete signatures for several local lbrefract helpers, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for fn_80021F70, fn_80021FF8, and fn_8002206C with typed callback-style parameters.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbrefract.c prototype changes near function comments 021F70, 021FF8, 02206C

what_changed.text: Added implementations for texture coordinate buffer generation and IA4/RGB565-style read/write helpers, including lbRefract_80021CE8, fn_80021F70, fn_80021FF8, and fn_8002206C.
Changed lbRefract_8002219C width/height parameters from u16 to s32 in the local declaration and implementation, while casting to u16 for GXGetTexBufferSize.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_8002219C prototype and implementation width/height changed to s32

what_changed.text: Replaced raw lbl_804336D0 int-array indexing with a typed static struct containing refractionUserCount, image_ptr, texture object arrays, image descriptor pointers, and texture_mtx.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static int lbl_804336D0[0x10] replaced by static struct lbl_804336D0_t lbl_804336D0
raw_diff: lbl_804336D0[0]/[1] usages changed to refractionUserCount/image_ptr

what_changed.text: Recovered a larger data layout struct for lbl_803BB0B0 holding matrices, HSD image/texture descriptors, DObj/PObj info, and library/object names, then initialized it in C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct lbRefract_DataLayout lbl_803BB0B0 initializer with refract_class_library/refract_dobj/refract_pobj

what_changed.text: Cleaned lbRefract_8002247C by switching on HSD_CObjGetProjectionType directly and using HSD_CObj projection_param fields and cobj->near instead of M2C_FIELD offsets.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: MTXLightPerspective/Frustum/Ortho calls changed from M2C_FIELD and pointer arithmetic to cobj->projection_param fields

what_changed.text: Updated THPDec_80331340 to accept a fifth s32 argument and passed width at two lbmthp call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbmthp.h THPDec_80331340 declaration changed to five parameters

what_changed.text: The decomp bot reported matched-code progress but also one broken lbrefract .sdata match.

smart_moves.text: Used a typed local state struct for lbl_804336D0 instead of keeping array indexing and raw offset access, improving readability while preserving size with a static assert.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct lbl_804336D0_t fields and STATIC_ASSERT

smart_moves.text: Mapped camera projection parameters to HSD_CObj fields in lbRefract_8002247C rather than retaining generated M2C_FIELD access.
Kept the THPDec_80331340 signature update synchronized between header and call sites.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: both lbmthp.c call sites pass a fifth width argument

smart_moves.text: Converted generated-looking switch/goto return flow in lbRefract_8002219C into ordinary switch cases with breaks and one final success return.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed block_11 label/goto pattern and returns 0 after switch

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves helper signatures, update local prototypes and the owning header/call sites together; this PR's THPDec_80331340 and lbrefract callback helpers show signature recovery tied to match progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDec_80331340 header and call-site updates
bot_report: fn_8001EF5C and several lbrefract helpers reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: For lbrefract camera/projection code, typed HSD_CObj projection fields can replace raw M2C_FIELD offsets when the projection variant is known from HSD_CObjGetProjectionType.
Replacing a generated switch/goto success path with a normal switch plus shared final return can be compatible with matching when the cases share the same success behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_8002219C removed block_11/goto and uses break plus return 0

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed recovered globals with size checks can make state access more reviewable than integer-array globals, but data-section effects need to be watched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbl_804336D0_t with STATIC_ASSERT and field uses
bot_report: lbrefract .sdata broken match after PR

naming_conventions.name: lbRefract_*
naming_conventions.convention: Externally visible recovered functions in this file keep the lbRefract_ prefix plus address-style suffix when fuller semantics are not proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_80021CE8, lbRefract_8002219C, lbRefract_800222A4, lbRefract_8002247C, lbRefract_PObjLoad

naming_conventions.name: fn_8002xxxx
naming_conventions.convention: Static helpers with uncertain semantics retain address-style fn_ names while using concrete signatures.

naming_conventions.name: lbl_804336D0_t
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered anonymous-address global layout was given an address-derived struct typedef-style name rather than a speculative semantic name.

naming_conventions.name: lbRefract_DataLayout
naming_conventions.convention: A recovered data-layout struct received a subsystem-prefixed semantic name when its fields were directly tied to lbrefract descriptors and class metadata.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct lbRefract_DataLayout fields include texture_mtx, imagedesc, tobj, dobj_info, pobj_info, lib_name, dobj_name, pobj_name

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(20) and a volatile f32 temporary were used in lbRefract_80021CE8 around floating-point/ref reciprocal-square-root code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_80021CE8 contains PAD_STACK(20) and volatile f32 sp18
bot_report: lbRefract_80021CE8 improved from 0.00% to 98.12%, not 100%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence shows improvement but not a complete match for lbRefract_80021CE8; retain as a tactic observation, not a general style endorsement.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_PObjLoad excerpt shows repeated dst[offset] = src[offset]; offset += stride sequence inside do loop
bot_report: lbRefract_PObjLoad improved from 0.00% to 70.48%, not 100%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Function pointer callbacks were cast at call sites in lbRefract_80021CE8 to match the callback argument shape.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The loaded excerpt does not show the callback field types from lbrefract.h, so this remains file-specific evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Data-layout recovery used concrete HSD descriptor/class structs and static initialization rather than separate dummy globals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbRefract_DataLayout definition and lbl_803BB0B0 initializer
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Bot report records a .sdata regression, so data-layout changes should be checked with section reports.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed HSD_CObj projection access can close lbrefract projection code
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbRefract_8002247C, replacing M2C_FIELD camera offsets with cobj->projection_param.* fields and cobj->near coincided with the function reaching 100%. Scope this lesson to HSD_CObj projection variants where the union arm is known from HSD_CObjGetProjectionType.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Signature recovery should update headers and call sites together
accepted_candidate_records.text: THPDec_80331340 gained a fifth s32 width parameter in lbmthp.h and both visible lbmthp.c call sites were updated; fn_8001EF5C reached 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: THPDec_80331340 prototype and call-site changes

source_update_candidates.title: lbrefract data-layout changes can affect .sdata matching
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2395 recovered typed lbrefract globals/struct data and static initializers while the bot reported main/melee/lb/lbrefract .sdata regressing from 100.00% to 28.57% (-6 bytes). Consider recording a path-scoped caution that lbrefract data-layout work needs section-level checks.
source_update_candidates.reason: The evidence is path-specific and useful for future lbrefract work, but should be curated as a path fact/caution rather than a global standard.
